question_intent: total royalty payments for authors in California

plan.question_intent: total royalty payments for authors in California
plan.detail_query: SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.state, t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, r.royalty, ta.royaltyper, (s.qty * t.price * r.royalty / 100) * ta.royaltyper / 100 AS royalty_payment FROM authors a JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id JOIN roysched r ON t.title_id = r.title_id AND s.qty BETWEEN r.lorange AND r.hirange WHERE a.state = 'CA'

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.state, t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, r.royalty, ta.royaltyper
join_clauses: JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN roysched r ON t.title_id = r.title_id AND s.qty BETWEEN r.lorange AND r.hirange
blocks.notes: authors in California with their titles, sales quantities, prices, royalties, and royalty percentages

blocks.name: root
blocks.select_clause: SELECT SUM((qty * price * royalty / 100) * royaltyper / 100) AS total_royalty_payment

build_logs.notes: authors in California with their titles, sales quantities, prices, royalties, and royalty percentages

steps.clause: JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.state, t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, r.royalty, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN roysched r ON t.title_id = r.title_id AND s.qty BETWEEN r.lorange AND r.hirange
WHERE (a.state = 'CA')

preview.title: Prolonged Data Deprivation: Four Case Studies

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.state, t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, r.royalty, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN roysched r ON t.title_id = r.title_id AND s.qty BETWEEN r.lorange AND r.hirange
WHERE (a.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

preview.title: Prolonged Data Deprivation: Four Case Studies

steps.sql:
SELECT SUM((qty * price * royalty / 100) * royaltyper / 100) AS total_royalty_payment
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.state, t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, r.royalty, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN roysched r ON t.title_id = r.title_id AND s.qty BETWEEN r.lorange AND r.hirange
WHERE (a.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(royalty_amount) AS total_royalty_amount
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.contract, t.title, t.price, t.royalty, ta.royaltyper, s.qty, (t.price * s.qty * t.royalty / 100) * ta.royaltyper / 100 AS royalty_amount
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE ((a.state = 'CA')) AND ((a.contract = 1))
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.contract, t.title, t.price, t.royalty, ta.royaltyper, s.qty) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, s.stor_id, s.qty, (t.price * s.qty) AS revenue
FROM titles t
JOIN sales s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN stores st ON s.stor_id = st.stor_id
WHERE ((t.type = 'business')) AND ((st.state = 'CA'))) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total royalty payment amount for authors in California, calculated as the sum of each sale's quantity multiplied by the title's price, multiplied by the royalty rate, then multiplied by the author's royalty percentage?
